data.title: 国际服Blue Archive Steam发布延期
data.summary: [Notice of STEAM Client Launch Delay Due to Platform Review] Sensei, this is Blue Archive. We regret
data.body:
[Notice of STEAM Client Launch Delay Due to Platform Review]

Sensei, this is Blue Archive.
We regret to inform you that the release of the STEAM client, originally scheduled for Tuesday, June 24, has been unavoidably delayed due to a delay in the platform review process.

We sincerely apologize to everyone who has been waiting, and we kindly ask for your understanding regarding this sudden change in schedule.

All of our team members are working diligently to prepare the STEAM client so that we can launch it as soon as possible.

We will provide an update with the new release schedule through an official notice as soon as it is confirmed.

Thank you for your patience and support.
![image.png](https://kivo.wiki/files/526/0I3OcsaGuPV46ppC5H10y0pHRUkUtNCi.png)
